articles.title: 56% OF COMPANIES MISSED REVENUE GOALS IN 2023
articles.summary: Poor marketing pipeline performance and slower sales velocity in 2023 are predictive of soft revenue growth in 2024 if companies don't make changes. The majority of companies across SMB, mid-market, and enterprise segments missed their revenue targets in 2023, with those that cut GTM funding suffering the most.

articles.title: GOOGLE CLOUD NEXT 2024: EVERYTHING ANNOUNCED SO FAR
articles.summary: Google Cloud Next 2024, held in Las Vegas, featured numerous announcements focused on AI, devops, security, and cloud technologies. Key highlights included AI-powered tools for app database management, a focus on data sovereignty partnerships, generative AI security products, the Gemini Code Assist tool, Nvidia's Blackwell platform coming to Google Cloud, updates to Google Workspace, the enhanced Imagen 2 tool, and Google's first custom Arm processor, Axion.

articles.title: VC MONEY MAKES YOU DUMB
articles.summary: Common pitfalls VC-backed companies fall into include losing focus on essential business growth and sustainability due to the pressure of meeting VC expectations and milestones. It is important to maintain a balance between using VC funds for growth and retain the creativity and frugality of a bootstrapped company. Metric tunnel vision can be dangerous. Focus on real, profitable business practices.

articles.title: THE ARC PRODUCT-MARKET FIT FRAMEWORK
articles.summary: Sequoia presents a framework for understanding product-market fit (PMF) based on three distinct archetypes: "Hair on Fire" (solving an urgent, obvious need in a crowded market), "Hard Fact" (solving a problem customers have accepted as a fact of life), and "Future Vision" (enabling a new reality through visionary innovation). The path a company takes depends on how customers relate to the problem being solved, and each path requires different operating priorities to succeed, with legendary companies often evolving through multiple paths as they introduce new products over time.

articles.title: STARTUP FOUNDER SURVIVAL GUIDE (DOCUMENT)
articles.summary: An archive of lessons from a veteran founder.

articles.title: PMF METHOD (PROGRAM)
articles.summary: Free 14-week intensive experience designed to help exceptional B2B founders build epic companies.

articles.title: ATOMIZE (TEMPLATE)
articles.summary: The most advanced Design System for Figma.

articles.title: HOW ECOSYSTEM-LED GROWTH UNLOCKS THE NEXT GENERATION OF GTM
articles.summary: In this interview, Bob Moore, CEO of Crossbeam, discusses his new book "Ecosystem-Led Growth" and how leveraging partner data and relationships can significantly improve customer acquisition, account expansion, and access to new markets. He emphasizes the importance of operationalizing ecosystem data across the entire go-to-market team, not just the partnerships team, and shares insights from his experiences as a three-time founder, highlighting the potential of ecosystem-qualified leads and the role of proprietary data in the age of AI.

articles.title: YOUR BOARD MEETING SHOULDN’T BE A FINAL EXAM
articles.summary: This article provides advice on how to prepare for and handle board meetings effectively. It emphasizes the importance of regularly monitoring key metrics, comparing performance against forecasts, proactively communicating bad news, and presenting information concisely to the board.

articles.title: DO YOU NEED TO WIN TODAY, OR TOMORROW?
articles.summary: This article discusses the concept of a "rebuilding year" in professional sports, where teams trade their best players for future prospects, and applies this framework to businesses deciding whether to focus on current growth or future investments. Companies should carefully consider factors such as their growth rate, market opportunities, and available resources when deciding whether to prioritize winning today or building for tomorrow. Have explicit conversations with the team and board to ensure everyone agrees on the chosen strategy.

articles.title: VC DEALS IN 2024 ARE THE MOST EXPENSIVE EVER
articles.summary: VCs are currently focusing their investments on AI, standout SaaS deals, and seed deals with strong teams or innovative products, despite a general downturn in venture funding.

articles.title: JEVONS PARADOX
articles.summary: The concept of Jevons paradox states that when a resource becomes more efficient, its consumption tends to increase rather than decrease.

articles.title: THE ART OF PM IN AI
articles.summary: Product managers and designers working with AI face the challenge of designing a delightful product experience that cannot be fully predicted due to the non-deterministic nature of ML models.
